fields.summary: [YARN-8851] Add a shared device mapping manager (scheduler) for device plugins
[Umbrella] A pluggable device plugin framework to ease vendor plugin development

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: Since a few devices uses FIFO policy to assign devices to the container, we use a shared device manager to handle all types of devices.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: [YARN-8851] Add basic pluggable device plugin framework

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: [DevicePlugin] Add an interface for device plugin to provide customized scheduler

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

[~sunilg] , [~leftnoteasy], Could you please help to review?

[~tangzhankun], why rename "device-scheduler" to "device-mapping-manager"? :) I understand what it do is mapping devices to containers. But I would prefer to call it DeviceScheduler instead of DeviceMappingManager given name "scheduler" means booking, ordering, etc.

[~leftnoteasy] , Yeah. And it will include a list of device plugin scheduler if we merge the customized device scheduler interface. Do we have a better name than "DeviceScheduler"? the original "DeviceSchedulerManager"?
Thanks [~tangzhankun], existing code looks good, committing ..
Thanks [~tangzhankun], committed to trunk.

SUCCESS: Integrated in Jenkins build Hadoop-trunk-Commit #15522 (See [https://builds.apache.org/job/Hadoop-trunk-Commit/15522/])

[~sunilg] , [~leftnoteasy], Could you please help to review?

[~tangzhankun], why rename "device-scheduler" to "device-mapping-manager"? :) I understand what it do is mapping devices to containers. But I would prefer to call it DeviceScheduler instead of DeviceMappingManager given name "scheduler" means booking, ordering, etc.

[~leftnoteasy] , Yeah. And it will include a list of device plugin scheduler if we merge the customized device scheduler interface. Do we have a better name than "DeviceScheduler"? the original "DeviceSchedulerManager"?
Thanks [~tangzhankun], existing code looks good, committing ..
Thanks [~tangzhankun], committed to trunk.

SUCCESS: Integrated in Jenkins build Hadoop-trunk-Commit #15522 (See [https://builds.apache.org/job/Hadoop-trunk-Commit/15522/])
YARN-8882. [YARN-8851] Add a shared device mapping manager (scheduler) (wangda: rev 579ef4be063745c5211127eca83a393ceddc8b79)
